message:
feat(core,runtime,render,tty,widgets): graceful signal shutdown, schema compat layer, policy discovery, buffer safety, and compile-fail tests

Graceful termination signals (ftui-core, ftui-tty):
- Add pending termination signal API (record/query/clear) with AtomicI32
  in terminal_session, replacing immediate process::exit on SIGINT/SIGTERM/
  SIGHUP/SIGQUIT with a 2-second grace period for runtime acknowledgement.
- ftui-tty signal hook now loops over signals, tracks live intercept session
  count via AtomicUsize, and waits for runtime to clear the pending signal
  before exiting (falls back to exit after grace period).
- TerminalSession gains a `headless` flag; new_for_tests no longer installs
  the global panic hook or writes to the real terminal on cleanup/drop.
- Extract size_retry_delay() helper that skips the startup retry probe when
  the Cx deadline cannot cover the delay, preventing wasted time on tight
  budgets.

Schema compatibility layer (ftui-runtime):
- New schema_compat module with SchemaKind enum (EventTrace, RenderTrace,
  GoldenTrace, Evidence), Compatibility enum (Full, Forward, None), and a
  full N x N compatibility matrix (default_compatibility_matrix) with
  per-kind check functions and run_compatibility_matrix runner.
- New TraceCompatFailuresTotal builtin counter in metrics_registry.
- New schema_compat_matrix integration test validating forward/full/none
  compatibility across all schema kinds.

Policy config hardening and discovery (ftui-runtime):
- from_toml_str / from_json_str now validate after deserialization.
- New from_cargo_toml_str / from_cargo_toml_file loaders that read policy
  from [package.metadata.ftui] in Cargo.toml manifests.
- discover_in_dir searches ftui-policy.toml > ftui-policy.json > Cargo.toml
  with clear precedence.
- validate() now checks all f64 fields for NaN/Infinity before range checks,
  preventing confusing downstream errors from non-finite config values.
- Exhaustive unit tests for NaN/Infinity rejection, Cargo.toml loading,
  discovery precedence, missing metadata error paths.

Policy registry (ftui-runtime):
- New policy_registry module with PolicyRegistry backed by arc-swap for
  lock-free hot-swappable policy configs, PolicySwitchEvent history, and
  PolicyRegistryError for validation/load failures.

Runtime program enhancements (ftui-runtime):
- Program gains graceful_shutdown() checking pending_termination_signal
  each tick, teardown_session() for orderly cleanup, and signal-aware
  event polling in run loops.
- TerminalWriter gains write_all_with_retry() with configurable retry
  count/delay and partial-write error classification.

Render buffer safety (ftui-render):
- set_raw() now runs cleanup_overlap + cleanup_orphaned_tails like set(),
  preventing stale continuation cells when overwriting wide glyphs via the
  raw path.
- clear_with() handles wide cells correctly, laying out head+continuation
  pairs per row and leaving remainder cells empty.
- Presenter extracts finish_frame() and finish_frame_best_effort() for
  explicit frame-end SGR/hyperlink cleanup; emit_orphan_continuation_space()
  resets style and closes links before writing the blank, preventing style
  bleed from previous cells.

Widget and table fixes (ftui-widgets):
- Row::height() clamps values below 1 to prevent zero-height rows that
  break vertical layout flow.
- scroll_up/scroll_down parameter renamed from lines to rows for clarity.
- galaxy-brain feature gate removed; decision_card module is now always
  compiled, ftui-runtime is a mandatory dependency.
- proptest succinct invariants: fix dense_rank to match EliasFano::rank
  semantics (count values <= v, not < v); rewrite arb_degree_sequence for
  correct BFS reachability invariant; spot-check depth/subtree_size on
  root only to avoid O(n^2) test cost.

New test files:
- compile_fail tests (trybuild) for terminal mode typestate transitions
  (10 .rs/.stderr pairs covering cooked/raw/alt invalid transitions).
- s3_fifo_e2e: integration tests for S3-FIFO cache in widget/layout scenarios.
- arena_e2e: integration tests for per-frame arena allocation in render pipeline.
- schema_compat_matrix: CI gate for reader/writer compatibility matrix.
- succinct_bench: criterion benchmarks for Elias-Fano and LOUDS vs dense.
- succinct_e2e: end-to-end tests for succinct data structures in widget pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+error[E0599]: no method named `exit_raw` found for struct `ftui_core::mode_typestate::TerminalMode<3>` in the current scope
+ --> tests/compile_fail/alt_cannot_exit_raw.rs:6:9
+  |
+6 |     alt.exit_raw();
+  |         ^^^^^^^^ method not found in `ftui_core::mode_typestate::TerminalMode<3>`
+  |
+  = note: the method was found for
+          - `ftui_core::mode_typestate::TerminalMode<ftui_core::::mode_typestate::{impl#6}::{constant#0}>`

+6 +     cooked.has_mouse();
+  |
